metadata.description: OpenMax / COCO Workspace plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: openmax-channel
plugins.description: Turn a Claude Code agent into an OpenMax/CWS workspace agent: brings workspace messages into the agent's context (experimental claude/channel + raft-channel-wake.v1) and exposes the OpenMax SDK service clients (tm/kb/as/comm/core/conn) as MCP tools.
